name: approval-gates
title: Approval Gates
description: Bind approvals to exact tool inputs, expiry, and one-time execution.

notes: Production storage must bind immutable input, authenticated approver, expiry, and one-time consumption transactionally.
Approval clients must present the exact action and consequence before collecting a decision.

documentation.whenToUse: Use at the server boundary before consequential tool execution.
documentation.whenNotToUse: Do not gate cheap read-only work or execute based only on client state.
tradeoffs: Production stores must enforce single consumption transactionally.
